subject: Accounting
title: Audit Reform Debates
description: A short lesson to help you apply Audit Reform Debates.

hook.text: Should auditors be rotated every few years? Should audit-only firms replace the Big Four model?

buildup.text: After repeated failures, regulators worldwide are debating fundamental reforms to the audit industry.

discovery.text: Proposals include mandatory firm rotation, separating audit from consulting, and joint audits.

twist.text: The Big Four resist major changes, arguing they would reduce quality and raise costs.

climax.text: The debate continues, but one thing is clear: the status quo isn't working well enough.

punchline.text: Reform is debated. Failures keep proving it's needed.

quiz.question: What is one proposed reform for the audit industry?
